title: fragaria ovalis var. glauca
intro: Fragaria ovalis var. glauca, also known as the glaucous wood strawberry or glaucous wood strawberry plant, is a plant species within the Rosaceae family, specifically a variety of the Fragaria ovalis species. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fragaria ovalis var. glauca include potential uses in treating various health conditions such as digestive issues, fever reduction, and skin problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
